puzzle.hint: A heartfelt supplication of Prophet Ibrahim (Abraham) asking Allah to make him and his descendants steadfast in prayer.
puzzle.arabic: رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْنِى مُقِيمَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَآءِ
puzzle.verseEn: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and [many] from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.
